# Transcrição: 8. Change of the Guard

- **Fonte:** 8. Change of the Guard
- **Duração:** 00:58
- **Idioma:** en
- **Modelo:** small

---

## [00:00 - 00:58]

The change in guard has happened to me a hundred times. It's one of the most disappointing things in sales. It's probably the thing I hate about business more than any other thing. I had the lead, I had the way in, I was at top of everybody's list. They were close to making a decision and sure enough, the big company moved our contact to another part of the world. Change in guard. It's gonna happen to you. It's gonna happen to you hundreds of times. If you're in business, if you're in sales, if you run a sales organization, if you take leads and you nurtured that lead for six months or 12 months, there's gonna be a change in guard that's gonna upset you. The only way to handle the change in guard is to keep your pipeline full, to nurture these leads. Oh, by the way, when he or she goes to that other company, you're still in their mind, so follow them up when they move over there, but you're gonna be starting over with this client. I know it's disappointing, get used to it, grow up. It's the real world you live in. That's why you keep a pipeline full, real full, and you keep your schedule working and keep following up.
